title: MeshworkCanvas
description: Full canvas payload for a Meshwork Studio workspace — arrays of nodes and edges as persisted to the database and exchanged with the Mosh AI co-pilot.

nodes.description: Ordered list of ReactFlow nodes on the canvas.

edges.description: Ordered list of ReactFlow edges on the canvas.

Node.description: A single infrastructure component placed on the canvas.

id.description: Unique string identifier for this node. Stable across saves.

type.description: Visual renderer and category identifier. Must match an entry in the VALID_TYPES registry.

parentId.description: ID of a container node this node is nested inside (vpc, region, k8s-namespace). When set, extent MUST also be 'parent'.

extent.description: Must be exactly 'parent' when parentId is set. Constrains drag movement to the parent bounds.

width.description: Measured width in pixels (written by ReactFlow after render). Read-only at the application level.

height.description: Measured height in pixels (written by ReactFlow after render). Read-only at the application level.

measured.description: ReactFlow internal sizing measurement. Managed by the renderer.

Position.description: Canvas coordinate in logical pixels relative to the flow's origin (0,0). Not screen pixels.

x.description: Horizontal position on the infinite canvas. Increases to the right.

y.description: Vertical position on the infinite canvas. Increases downward.

NodeData.description: Application-level metadata attached to a node. Accessible inside node renderers via props.data.

label.description: Human-readable display name shown on the node card.

category.description: Logical grouping used for visual filtering and Mosh AI context.

description.description: Optional longer description shown in the Properties sidebar.

tags.description: Freeform string tags for filtering, search, and AI summarization.

provider.description: Optional cloud provider hint rendered as a provider badge (e.g. 'aws', 'gcp', 'azure').

accentColor.description: Optional hex or CSS color for the node accent/border glow. Overrides the default theme accent.

note.description: For 'note' typed nodes only — the markdown body text rendered inside the sticky-note block.

NodeAiMetadata.description: Mosh AI-generated annotations stored with each node. Never rendered as UI — used by Mosh for context on follow-up prompts.

summary.description: Short AI-generated summary of this component's role in the overall architecture.

notes.description: Extended design notes authored or updated by Mosh.

lastAnalyzed.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last time Mosh analyzed or touched this node.

NodeStyle.description: Visual style overrides applied to the node renderer. All fields are optional — missing values use the design-system defaults.

width.description: Override the canonical node width (px). Should match NODE_SIZES for the given type unless intentionally resized.

height.description: Override the canonical node height (px). Should match NODE_SIZES for the given type unless intentionally resized.

backgroundColor.description: Card background fill. Accepts any valid CSS color string.

opacity.description: Overall node opacity (0 = fully transparent, 1 = fully opaque).

icon.description: Optional custom icon override. Can be a Lucide icon name or a URL to an SVG/PNG.

theme.description: Named visual theme variant for the node renderer.

Edge.description: A directed connection between two nodes.

id.description: Unique string identifier for this edge.

source.description: ID of the originating node. Must match a node.id in the same canvas.

target.description: ID of the destination node. Must match a node.id in the same canvas.

sourceHandle.description: Optional ReactFlow handle ID on the source node (e.g. 'right', 'bottom').

targetHandle.description: Optional ReactFlow handle ID on the target node (e.g. 'left', 'top').

animated.description: When true, renders a marching-ants dash animation along the edge — used for active data flows.

label.description: Short text label rendered at the midpoint of the edge.

labelStyle.description: CSS style overrides for the label text element.

labelBgStyle.description: CSS style overrides for the label background pill.

labelBgPadding.description: [horizontal, vertical] padding in pixels around the label background.

labelBgBorderRadius.description: Corner radius of the label background.

EdgeStyle.description: SVG path styling for the edge line.

strokeDasharray.description: SVG strokeDasharray value for dashed/dotted lines.

EdgeMarker.description: Arrowhead marker rendered at the target end of the edge.

color.description: Fill/stroke color of the arrowhead. Should match the edge stroke color.

EdgeData.description: Application-level metadata for a connection. Accessible in edge renderers via props.data.

label.description: Duplicate of the top-level label field (kept in sync). Used by the Properties sidebar to read/write the edge label.

description.description: Longer description of what this connection represents.

ai.description: Mosh AI-generated annotations for this connection.

notes.description: AI design notes about this connection (e.g. protocol, SLA, security posture).
